base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of enemy_fish_man_jump_shoot — a character from 1986 castlevania. Fish Man — 3-frame cycle: leap-out-of-water, stand-and-spit (green fireball), dive-back. Appears in underground water-section (Level 4 Caverns). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Fish Man — 3-frame cycle: leap-out-of-water, stand-and-spit (green fireball), dive-back. Appears in underground water-section (Level 4 Caverns)
